events.description: segment opens, 'What is a Blob?' title fades in
file card with filename, path, and content slides in with spring scale
filename 'resolver.js' gets red strikethrough line drawn across it, X mark appears
path 'src/dns/resolver.js' gets red strikethrough line drawn across it, X mark appears
raw content section glows with cyan border and shadow — key moment, content highlighted
'A blob = just the raw content' label fades in below card
scene 1 crossfades out, scene 2 (pipeline) crossfades in
pipeline title 'Git Hashing Pipeline' fades in, content box slides in from left
first arrow connector draws in, traveling pulse dot starts moving
SHA-1 hash function box pops in with spring scale
SHA-1 hash value '2e65efe...a3f894' reveals with amber glow — key information
second arrow connector draws in toward stored object
compressed blob object container slides in from right
compressed indicator with Package icon pops in with spring — 'Blob Object' label + zlib compressed lines
.git/objects/2e/65efe... path lights up with blue glow — final destination
bottom summary label fades in: 'Content-addressable storage — same content = same hash = same blob'
